about.title: About Me
about.p1: I'm a web developer — I build apps that people actually use. What I care about most is taking things from idea to finished product: clean code, real features, something that actually ships.
about.p2: I mainly work with TypeScript, Next.js and Tailwind, and I live in the terminal on Linux (Fedora, after two years on Arch). I'm increasingly drawn to security — I like understanding systems deeply enough to know where they break, and how to build them so they don't.
about.p3: Outside of code, I play chess, train kickboxing and read about engineering and physics

metadata.description: Portfolio of Tomasz Tłusty – web projects, cybersecurity, hardware (ESP32, PCB), Next.js and TypeScript apps.
metadata.ogDescription: Web projects, cybersecurity and hardware. See my work.
